steps_raw.instruction: Perform after secondary antibody incubation and 3 times 00:05:00 rinses with TBS Contributed by users . ( 00:05:00 , 00:05:00 )

Place Cupric sulfate solution Contributed by users into wells of a six well tissue culture plate. Transfer the tissue sections into the wells and incubate at 4 °C with shaking for 00:30:00 . This step reduces autofluorescence from lipofuscin granules in the tissue (Schnell et al., 1999).

Transfer the tissue to the wells of a tissue culture plate containing TBS Contributed by users . Rinse the tissue three to four times in TBS with shaking for about 00:10:00 . ( 00:10:00 , 00:10:00 , 00:10:00 ).
Mount tissue on slides and coverslip with mounting media Contributed by users .
